mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity WHERE deleted = 0 AND store_id = #{storeId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM activity WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity(store_id, title, image_url, sort, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{title}, #{imageUrl}, #{sort}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE activity SET store_id = #{storeId}, title = #{title}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE activity SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
